name: Conversation-master task intake source rule
type: LINE task intake governance / runtime source migration
requiresDatabases: project-local LINE raw message log database
project-local LINE group member index database
project-local LINE group member option database
requires: Conversation master pages store enough recent LINE message content for task judgement
Raw message database remains available for webhook logging, outgoing logs, attachment audit, resend tracing, and debugging
Hourly task judgement can be run in dry-run mode before production use
User UI generator can be regenerated from project-local Notion data
changes: Forbid using MessageDataSourceID as a LINE task-judgement input
Use ConversationDataSourceID as the only LINE conversation source for hourly task judgement, User UI evidence, and daily report conversation clues
Read the latest 20 messages from each conversation master page when judging LINE task updates or new events
Replace per-message judgement flags with conversation-level judgement fields on the conversation master
Keep writing raw incoming and outgoing messages to the message log for audit and debugging only
Add a LINE group member index table for durable Group ID or Room ID to User ID membership relationships
Populate the group member index from webhook events when a group or room member speaks, and optionally from LINE API when available
Derive group member option records from the member index instead of reading the message log
Regenerate User UI and 08:00 daily report previews from conversation-master content
verification: Syntax checks pass for all changed runtime and script files
Hourly judgement dry-run reports sourceDataSource as ConversationDataSourceID and uses conversation-prefixed source message ids
Group option dry-run reads conversation master pages and group member index records
08:00 daily report preview generation succeeds and counts conversation clues from the conversation master
Generated User UI does not configure the message log as its LINE evidence source
Remaining MessageDataSourceID references are limited to raw/outgoing log, attachment audit, resend tracing, or debugging
dataBoundary: AMCore stores only the shared rule, checklist, package metadata, and implementation notes
Do not copy project LINE messages, customer records, Notion pages, database IDs, tokens, or Render secrets into AMCore
Each project must create and fill its own group member index database
Each project must deploy and verify production separately
dataIsolation: The migration changes source-selection behavior inside each project-local runtime. Conversation records, message logs, tasks, reports, group member indexes, attachments, and generated User UI files remain inside the target project. AMCore stores no live project data.
definitionOfDone: Project docs state that ConversationDataSourceID is the only LINE source for task judgement, User UI evidence, and report conversation clues
Project docs state that MessageDataSourceID is raw/outgoing/attachment/debug only
Hourly LINE task judgement no longer queries MessageDataSourceID
Hourly LINE task judgement reads the latest 20 conversation-master messages per conversation segment
Conversation master schema has judgement tracking fields replacing the message-level judged flag
User UI generator is conversation-led and excludes MessageDataSourceID as its LINE evidence source
Daily report preview reads conversation clues from the conversation master
LINE group member index database exists and its env var is configured
Webhook records group or room member appearances into the member index when source user id is present
Group member option sync reads from the member index, not from message records
Dry-run verification passes before production deployment
Production Render service is deployed and checked separately for each project
rollback: Restore the previous project-local scripts and Render command configuration, remove the group member index sync from scheduled flows, and regenerate User UI from the prior generator. Do not delete conversation pages, message logs, tasks, attachments, or member index records during rollback.
